reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with better deployment framing, clearer dependence logic, and stronger role assignment for passive and active sensing.
strengths: The piece now explains how the active-versus-passive distinction changes operational dependence, not only sensing physics.
It gives useful deployment scenarios instead of leaving the article at textbook definitions.
The conclusion ties the comparison back to uncertainty reduction rather than to a simplistic technology preference.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it is more applied and more credible than a generic active-versus-passive explainer. It now works as a system-planning article.
